summary: Plan-only remediation assessment for five open PRs: four remain independent non-mutating classifications, and #79336 is routed to central security handling after deterministic validation flagged it as security-sensitive. No close/comment/label/merge mutation is planned. None of the non-security PRs has complete merge preflight proof: mergeability is unknown, Codex /review passed-clean proof is absent, comments were not hydrated despite existing comment counts, and #77895/#78931 have blocking check or review signals. No concrete replacement fix artifact is safe from the available evidence.

actions.reason: Independent PR in this inventory shard; do not merge or build a replacement from the available proof. Rehydrate comments/review details and repair failing checks in a PR-specific follow-up before any merge recommendation.
Independent test/harness PR; failing Real behavior proof blocks merge, and the artifact does not include enough failure detail for a concrete repair artifact.
Independent PR with promising checks, but this plan shard lacks the required merge proof. Keep it as a standalone candidate for full review hydration and Codex /review before merge.
Validator identified #79336 as security-sensitive, so ProjectClownfish must quarantine only this exact PR ref and route it to central OpenClaw security handling.
Independent, focused PR with passing checks, but merge is blocked until live mergeability, hydrated comments, and Codex /review proof are available.
